overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a stormy environment that transitions from a red-tinted village to a blue-night trading post. The character wears traditional Japanese clothing with a sword and shamisen on their back.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy village outskirts with red maple trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stormy red-tinted village outskirts, passing campfires and traditional buildings

entered.detail: wooden building with thatched roof and white banner
burning campfire illuminating the immediate area
dense cluster of red-leaved maple trees lining the path
vertical red banners on poles marking the path
distant mountain peak with fortress structure visible

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a stormy village outskirts bathed in red light. Traditional Japanese buildings and campfires line the path, while red maple trees and tall banners mark the way toward a distant mountain fortress.

scene_state.functional_zone: open approach to mountain trading post under stormy night sky

events.description: atmospheric lighting shifts from red storm tint to blue night with visible stars
text overlay appears identifying location as Kamikawa Trading Post

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the trading post as the storm lighting shifts to blue

entered.detail: tall green pine trees replacing the red maples
distant mountain range with snow visible on peaks
traditional wooden buildings of the trading post becoming visible
illuminated paper lantern hanging from a post
simple wooden fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from red to blue storm lighting as the character approaches the trading post. Pine trees and snow-capped mountains frame the path, while distant lightning illuminates the night sky. The location is identified as Kamikawa Trading Post.

scene_state.functional_zone: Kamikawa trading post center with wooden buildings and hanging lanterns

events.description: character slows and turns to observe surroundings near a campfire

agents.ego_description: walking through the trading post center, observing NPCs and turning to look around near a campfire

notable_agents.action: villager standing near a building entrance, observing the character
villager walking near a campfire in the center of the post

entered.detail: wooden cart with wheels parked near a building
central campfire burning in the trading post square

changed.to: multiple positions including right_near and center_mid

segments.scene_description: The character enters the heart of Kamikawa Trading Post, walking past wooden buildings illuminated by hanging paper lanterns. NPC villagers are visible near campfires and buildings. The character slows to observe the surroundings before continuing through the post.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy landscape that transforms from a red-tinted village outskirts into a blue-hued night at a trading post. It begins with the character walking past traditional Japanese buildings and campfires under a crimson glow, flanked by red maple trees and banners leading toward a distant mountain fortress. As the character advances, the environment shifts from red to deep blue storm lighting, with pine trees and snow-capped mountains framing the path while lightning flashes across the night sky. The scene then opens into the heart of Kamikawa Trading Post, where the camera follows the character past wooden buildings illuminated by hanging paper lanterns. Finally, the character slows to observe NPC villagers gathered near campfires before continuing their journey through the settlement.
